instructions.content: Before spawning any reviewers, check opencode.json for subAgents config. If configured with at least two distinct models, skip model selection and use the configured routing.

If subAgents is not configured, ask the user which environment they are running (OpenCode Zen, OpenCode Go, Claude Code, or BYOK) and present capability-vs-cost model options before spawning reviewers.
Spawn all 3 subagent reviewers in parallel — Technical (general), Strategic (general), and Risk (explore) — using the same plan brief with role-specific prompts.

After spawning all 3 reviewers, collate results into a Consolidated Review Report following the structure in assets/templates/review-report.yaml. Validate the report against assets/schemas/review-report.schema.json.
Validate the plan's YAML frontmatter against the context-file schema by running .context/plugins/pantheon-org/context-mgmt/context-index/scripts/validate-context-frontmatter.sh on the plan file.
Infer the local plan body convention by scanning H2 headings across all .context/plans/*.md files with: grep -r '^## ' .context/plans/*.md | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn
When the plan has a ## Steps section, check for proper Phases/Tasks/Waves decomposition — sequential phases, single-session tasks, and parallel waves.
NEVER proceed without asking about models first — model diversity is the main lever for catching different blind spots.
